Uses of Class
redis.clients.jedis.resps.LCSMatchResult

  • Packages that use LCSMatchResult 
    Package Description
    redis.clients.jedis  
    redis.clients.jedis.commands
    This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.

      Calculate the longest common subsequence of keyA and keyB.
      LCSMatchResult UnifiedJedis.lcs(String keyA, String keyB, LCSParams params) 
      LCSMatchResult Jedis.strAlgoLCSKeys(byte[] keyA, byte[] keyB, StrAlgoLCSParams params)
      Deprecated. 
      STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.

      LCSMatchResult Jedis.strAlgoLCSKeys(String keyA, String keyB, StrAlgoLCSParams params)
